# workflows

## Purpose

GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow definitions.

## Key Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `ci.yaml` | Main CI: build, lint, unit-tests, image push, release (auto-generated by kres) |
| `slack-notify.yaml` | Slack notification on release |
| `slack-notify-ci-failure.yaml` | Slack notification on CI failure |
| `lock.yml` | Lock stale issues/PRs |
| `stale.yml` | Mark and close stale issues/PRs |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory

- `ci.yaml` is auto-generated by kres — do not edit directly
- CI uses remote Docker Buildx builder (`tcp://buildkit-amd64.ci.svc.cluster.local:1234`)
- Main jobs: default (build+push), lint (PR only), unit-tests (PR only)
- Release artifacts created on tag push (`v*`)
